Liam Twomey:

Some thoughts on Chelsea’s recent home defeats (just my opinion, others are available)...

I saw A LOT of games at Stamford Bridge last season that were following the same script until Hazard did something.
It’s worth remembering that Chelsea lost their only elite match-winner last summer and the primary scorers/creators in Lampard’s team are all 22 or under (or Willian, who has never cracked double figures for goals or assists in a Premier League season)...

None of the central midfielders have goalscoring pedigree, nor do any of the centre-backs (the set-piece threat of Terry/Ivanovic/Cahill hasn’t been replaced).

Could Lampard be better tactically? Perhaps. He’s a young coach still learning, but over the course of the West Ham/Bournemouth/Southampton defeats he’s played 4-3-3, 4-2-3-1, 4-4-2 and 3-4-3. He is trying things.

Frustration at Stamford Bridge is growing and it’s always noisy on here. I’ll never tell anyone how to feel, but Chelsea went into the season searching for a post-Hazard identity and that’s a long-term process. 🤷🏻‍♂️

Liam Twomey:

Some thoughts on Chelsea’s recent home defeats (just my opinion, others are available)...

I saw A LOT of games at Stamford Bridge last season that were following the same script until Hazard did something.
It’s worth remembering that Chelsea lost their only elite match-winner last summer and the primary scorers/creators in Lampard’s team are all 22 or under (or Willian, who has never cracked double figures for goals or assists in a Premier League season)...

None of the central midfielders have goalscoring pedigree, nor do any of the centre-backs (the set-piece threat of Terry/Ivanovic/Cahill hasn’t been replaced).

Could Lampard be better tactically? Perhaps. He’s a young coach still learning, but over the course of the West Ham/Bournemouth/Southampton defeats he’s played 4-3-3, 4-2-3-1, 4-4-2 and 3-4-3. He is trying things.

Frustration at Stamford Bridge is growing and it’s always noisy on here. I’ll never tell anyone how to feel, but Chelsea went into the season searching for a post-Hazard identity and that’s a long-term process. 🤷🏻‍♂️

「現在我不知道將會發生什麼。」

據英國媒體報導，如果國際米蘭對阿朗素提出報價，車路士將會增加900萬英鎊的額外要價，只為對前教練干地出一口氣。

《太陽報》稱，國米希望得到藍軍左閘阿朗素，方式是租借，但車路士方面希望直接出售，要價為3500萬英鎊。不過，俄羅斯老闆艾巴的授意是，如果是干地想要，需要額外加價900萬英鎊，這個數字，正是干地通過訴訟，從車路士得到的賠償金。

干地當年在車路士第一年就拿到了英超冠軍，但隨後和球會上下關係破裂，被解僱後，他要求車路士全額支付最後一年工資，也就是900萬英鎊，為此不惜鬧上法庭，並最終贏得了這筆賠償。

江湖很小，如今干地看上車路士球員，藍軍恐怕要藉機出氣。國米提出的租借方案，車路士恐怕不會答應，而即使是收購，這900萬英鎊的報復性加價，恐怕會讓國米望而卻步。

按照車路士的打算，他們希望在冬季清洗阿朗素，轉而求購李斯特城的左閘捷維爾。

據英國媒體報導，如果國際米蘭對阿朗素提出報價，車路士將會增加900萬英鎊的額外要價，只為對前教練干地出一口氣。

《太陽報》稱，國米希望得到藍軍左閘阿朗素，方式是租借，但車路士方面希望直接出售，要價為3500萬英鎊。不過，俄羅斯老闆艾巴的授意是，如果是干地想要，需要額外加價900萬英鎊，這個數字，正是干地通過訴訟，從車路士得到的賠償金。

干地當年在車路士第一年就拿到了英超冠軍，但隨後和球會上下關係破裂，被解僱後，他要求車路士全額支付最後一年工資，也就是900萬英鎊，為此不惜鬧上法庭，並最終贏得了這筆賠償。

江湖很小，如今干地看上車路士球員，藍軍恐怕要藉機出氣。國米提出的租借方案，車路士恐怕不會答應，而即使是收購，這900萬英鎊的報復性加價，恐怕會讓國米望而卻步。

按照車路士的打算，他們希望在冬季清洗阿朗素，轉而求購李斯特城的左閘捷維爾。
